spot_api_binance_com.note: Full weight not isolated to cold IP; single delta=2, batch3 delta=4 is solid. Official docs historically list bookTicker full at weight 2-4.

rate_limit_budget_60s.spot_full_per_min: 1 call (~2-14 weight) vs ~6000 IP weight/min typical
rate_limit_budget_60s.fapi_full_per_min: 1 call weight 5 vs fapi IP pool
